name: Apple Turnover
recipeIngredient: Artificial sweetener to equal 2 tsp. sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sweetener, cinnamon, water, and lemon juice with the apple until tender.
2. Cool the mixture.
3. Remove the crust from the bread.
4. Roll out the remaining bread thinly.
5. Place the apple mixture on half of the bread.
6. Fold diagonally to form a triangle.
7. Moisten the edges with your finger and press together gently with a fork.
8. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit until crisp. Enjoy the crust of the bread.
Note: Remember to eat the crust of the bread.
